CustomField.formula: IF(LEN( FirstName ) = 0, 0,10) + IF(LEN( LastName ) = 0, 0,10)+ IF(LEN( Company ) = 0,0,10)+IF(LEN(Business_Card_Title__c)=0,0,10)+IF(ISBLANK(TEXT(LeadSource)),0,10) + IF(AND(LEN(MobilePhone)=0,LEN(Phone)=0),0,10) +IF(LEN(Email)=0,0,10) +IF(HasOptedOutOfEmail=TRUE,0,10) +IF(ISBLANK(TEXT(Language__c)),0,10) +IF(ISBLANK(TEXT(Country__c)),0,10)
CustomField.label: Data Quality Score
